item.description: Cuando el partido agonizaba, el zaguero no perdona frente al marco y de pierna derecha manda el balón a las redes y darles el triunfo a los turcos.

media:content.media:title: Gol de Kaan Ayhan y Tuquía vuelve a separarse frente a Estados Unidos
media:content.media:description: Cuando el partido agonizaba, el zaguero no perdona frente al marco y de pierna derecha manda el balón a las redes y darles el triunfo a los turcos.

item.title: Gol de Kaan Ayhan y Tuquía vuelve a separarse frente a Estados Unidos

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
item.description: Alex Freeman, son of former Green Bay Packers wideout Antonio Freeman, has stepped up for the U.S. men’s national team in the World Cup. It’s no surprise to his father.

media:content.media:text: USA v Australia: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman the U.S.'s 2-0 victory over Australia in Seattle on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Receiver Antonio Freeman #86 of the Green Bay Packers
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman the U.S.'s 2-0 victory over Australia in Seattle on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Alex Freeman #16 of the United States
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman the U.S.'s 2-0 victory over Australia in Seattle on Friday.

item.title: Football vs. fútbol: Who is the best Freeman? Dad Antonio salutes son Alex

item.description: El mediocampista remata de pierna derecha dentro del área y frente a varios rivales y compañeros el balón pasó para entra pegado al poste y anotar el segundo del USMNT sobre los turcos

media:content.media:title: Gol de Sebastian Berhalter y Estados Unidos iguala los cartones frente a Turquía
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista remata de pierna derecha dentro del área y frente a varios rivales y compañeros el balón pasó para entra pegado al poste y anotar el segundo del USMNT sobre los turcos

item.title: Gol de Sebastian Berhalter y Estados Unidos iguala los cartones frente a Turquía

item.description: Luego de un tiro de esquina, Kevin Rodríguez cabecea para bajar el balón en el área y Gonzalo Plata con un puntapié arrebata el balón de las manos del portero alemán, para darle la ventaja a los ecuatorianos por 2-1.

media:content.media:title: Gonzalo Plata vence a Neuer y firma heroica remontada de Ecuador sobre Alemania
media:content.media:description: Luego de un tiro de esquina, Kevin Rodríguez cabecea para bajar el balón en el área y Gonzalo Plata con un puntapié arrebata el balón de las manos del portero alemán, para darle la ventaja a los ecuatorianos por 2-1.

item.title: Gonzalo Plata vence a Neuer y firma heroica remontada de Ecuador sobre Alemania

item.description: El DT explicó el sufrimiento de la “Tri” en sus primeros partidos, donde casi queda fuera, y cómo logró vencer a Alemania en el último duelo para clasificar a 16vos; advirtió que puede competir contra cualquiera y llamó a la afición a mantenerse unida.

media:content.media:title: Beccacece tras triunfo de Ecuador ante Alemania: "La vida es saber sufrir y tener fe y confianza"
media:content.media:description: El DT explicó el sufrimiento de la “Tri” en sus primeros partidos, donde casi queda fuera, y cómo logró vencer a Alemania en el último duelo para clasificar a 16vos; advirtió que puede competir contra cualquiera y llamó a la afición a mantenerse unida.

item.title: Beccacece tras triunfo de Ecuador ante Alemania: "La vida es saber sufrir y tener fe y confianza"

item.description: El mediocampista finaliza una linda jugada colectiva con un remate de pierna derecha frente al marco y anotar el segundo de los turcos sobre los estadounidenses.

media:content.media:title: Gol de Orkun Kökcü y Tuquía le da la vuelta frente a Estados Unidos
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista finaliza una linda jugada colectiva con un remate de pierna derecha frente al marco y anotar el segundo de los turcos sobre los estadounidenses.

item.title: Gol de Orkun Kökcü y Tuquía le da la vuelta frente a Estados Unidos

item.description: En los primeros 3 minutos del partido llegó Auston Trusty para rematar con la izquierda y encajar el primer gol de USA de la noche. El entrenador Pochettino le da un beso y abrazo de celebración a Trusty, quien anotó por primera vez en un Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Cae el primer gol y Pochettino besa al goleador
media:content.media:description: En los primeros 3 minutos del partido llegó Auston Trusty para rematar con la izquierda y encajar el primer gol de USA de la noche. El entrenador Pochettino le da un beso y abrazo de celebración a Trusty, quien anotó por primera vez en un Mundial.

item.title: Cae el primer gol y Pochettino besa al goleador

item.description: El delantero aprovecha un error entre los defensas de Estados Unidos y marcar el primero de los turcos sobre los estadounidenses.

media:content.media:title: Gol de Arda Güler y Tuquía lo empata frente a Estados Unidos
media:content.media:description: El delantero aprovecha un error entre los defensas de Estados Unidos y marcar el primero de los turcos sobre los estadounidenses.

item.title: Gol de Arda Güler y Tuquía lo empata frente a Estados Unidos

item.description: El zaguero baja el balón de gran manera y de pierna izquierda lo pone pegado al poste ly marcar el primero del USMNT sobre los turcos.

media:content.media:title: Golazo de Auston Trusty y Estados Unidos rompe el cero frente a Turquía
media:content.media:description: El zaguero baja el balón de gran manera y de pierna izquierda lo pone pegado al poste ly marcar el primero del USMNT sobre los turcos.

item.title: Golazo de Auston Trusty y Estados Unidos rompe el cero frente a Turquía

item.description: Sebastián Beccacece destacó lo que significa el triunfo para Ecuador, mientras sus jugadores celebraron una clasificación sufrida y aseguraron que fueron superiores a Alemania. Del lado alemán, Nagelsmann y Neuer analizaron los errores del equipo.

media:content.media:title: Ecuador celebra una clasificación histórica ante Alemania
media:content.media:description: Sebastián Beccacece destacó lo que significa el triunfo para Ecuador, mientras sus jugadores celebraron una clasificación sufrida y aseguraron que fueron superiores a Alemania. Del lado alemán, Nagelsmann y Neuer analizaron los errores del equipo.

item.title: Ecuador celebra una clasificación histórica ante Alemania

item.description: Los ‘Nipones’ se pusieron arriba con el gol de Daizen Maeda, pero poco después llegó el tanto de la igualada para los suecos, cortesía de Anthony Elanga. Con este empate, las dos selecciones avanzan a la ronda de 16vos.

media:content.media:title: Un empate que ambos celebran: Japón y Suecia se van con un gol cada uno
media:content.media:description: Los ‘Nipones’ se pusieron arriba con el gol de Daizen Maeda, pero poco después llegó el tanto de la igualada para los suecos, cortesía de Anthony Elanga. Con este empate, las dos selecciones avanzan a la ronda de 16vos.

item.title: Un empate que ambos celebran: Japón y Suecia se van con un gol cada uno

item.description: Países Bajos cerró la fase de grupos con una sólida victoria 3-1 sobre Túnez para quedarse con el liderato del Grupo F. Brian Brobbey y Jan Paul van Hecke marcaron para los neerlandeses, mientras Hazem Mastouri descontó para los africanos.

media:content.media:title: ¡La Naranja Mecanica manda! Países Bajos derrota a Túnez y avanza como líder.
media:content.media:description: Países Bajos cerró la fase de grupos con una sólida victoria 3-1 sobre Túnez para quedarse con el liderato del Grupo F. Brian Brobbey y Jan Paul van Hecke marcaron para los neerlandeses, mientras Hazem Mastouri descontó para los africanos.

item.title: ¡La Naranja Mecanica manda! Países Bajos derrota a Túnez y avanza como líder.

item.description: A major Supreme Court ruling today came down in favor of President Trump's immigration policies, paving the way for the administration to strip hundreds of thousands of Haitian and Syrian refugees of deportation protections. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett reports.

media:content.media:title: Supreme Court allows Trump admin to remove deportation protections from thousands
media:content.media:description: A major Supreme Court ruling today came down in favor of President Trump's immigration policies, paving the way for the administration to strip hundreds of thousands of Haitian and Syrian refugees of deportation protections. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett reports.

item.title: Supreme Court allows Trump admin to remove deportation protections from thousands

item.description: The Supreme Court has ruled to allow the Trump administration to end the Temporary Protected Status for thousands of immigrants from Haiti and Syria. NBC News' Gary Grumbach reports on the court's split among ideological lines and how the ruling impacts the administration's immigration policies.

media:content.media:title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
media:content.media:description: The Supreme Court has ruled to allow the Trump administration to end the Temporary Protected Status for thousands of immigrants from Haiti and Syria. NBC News' Gary Grumbach reports on the court's split among ideological lines and how the ruling impacts the administration's immigration policies.

item.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants

item.description: Rescuers are racing to reach trapped survivors after massive back-to-back earthquakes in Venezuela. NBC News’ George Solis reports.

media:content.media:title: Deadly double earthquakes hit Venezuela
media:content.media:description: Rescuers are racing to reach trapped survivors after massive back-to-back earthquakes in Venezuela. NBC News’ George Solis reports.

item.title: Deadly double earthquakes hit Venezuela

item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
Allan Smith
item.description: But some in the party cautioned against taking too many national lessons from the successes of New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s congressional slate.

media:content.media:text: NYC Votes In Lively Primaries, With Suburban Race Key To House
media:content.media:description: Zohran Mamdani, mayor of New York, campaigns with Brad Lander, former New York City comptroller and US Democratic House candidate for New York, and Illapa Sairitupac, Democratic New York State assembly candidate, not pictured, during a primary election in New York, US, on Tuesday, June 23, 2026.
Democratic congressional candidate Brad Lander, center, arrives with New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani at an election night watch party Tuesday.

item.title: Democratic rift over the party’s future widens amid the left’s New York victories

item.description: In a major reversal, Senate Republicans refused to rein in President Donald Trump’s war powers, hours after he chastised members of his own party for going against him. Earlier in the day, the president refused to take part in a planned ceremony to sign a bill overwhelmingly passed by both parties aimed at making housing affordable, until, he says, the Senate passes the SAVE Act, which would require voters show proof of ID and citizenship documents to vote. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports fo

media:content.media:title: Senate Reverses Course on War Powers After Visit From Trump
media:content.media:description: In a major reversal, Senate Republicans refused to rein in President Donald Trump’s war powers, hours after he chastised members of his own party for going against him. Earlier in the day, the president refused to take part in a planned ceremony to sign a bill overwhelmingly passed by both parties aimed at making housing affordable, until, he says, the Senate passes the SAVE Act, which would require voters show proof of ID and citizenship documents to vote. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

item.title: Senate Reverses Course on War Powers After Visit From Trump

item.description: In our series “The Cost of Denial”, Erin McLaughlin reports on the military family fighting to get their son coverage for the autism therapy that could help him live a more independent life.

media:content.media:title: Family fights for coverage of autism therapy
media:content.media:description: In our series “The Cost of Denial”, Erin McLaughlin reports on the military family fighting to get their son coverage for the autism therapy that could help him live a more independent life.

item.title: Family fights for coverage of autism therapy

item.dc:creator: Alicia Victoria Lozano
Madeline Morrison
item.description: LOS ANGELES — After two days of deliberations, a jury told the court that it was at an impasse and unable to reach a unanimous decision in the trial about the origin of the devastating January 2025 fires in Los Angeles

media:content.media:description: Jonathan Rinderknecht.

media:content.media:text: A helicopter drops water as the Palisades Fire grows
media:content.media:description: A helicopter drops water as the Palisades Fire grows in the Pacific Palisades neighborhood of Los Angeles in January 2025.

item.title: Jury at an impasse in trial over deadly, destructive Palisades fire

item.dc:creator: Deanna Pai
item.description: Amazon Prime Day Lightning Deals are live, but shop now before they expire. Find limited-time discounts on Shark, Sony, Tatcha and more

media:content.media:text: The blink-and-you'll-miss-it deals include brands like Breville, KitchenAid and Anker.
media:content.media:description: The blink-and-you'll-miss-it deals include brands like Breville, KitchenAid and Anker.

media:content.media:text: The blink-and-you'll-miss-it deals include brands like Breville, KitchenAid and Anker.
media:content.media:description: The blink-and-you'll-miss-it deals include brands like Breville, KitchenAid and Anker.

item.title: Shop Prime Day’s blink-and-you’ll-miss-it deals from Breville, Topicals, Old Navy and more

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: Ecuador needed a win to remain in the tournament. It got exactly that.

media:content.media:text: Nilson Angulo runs on the field in celebration with his arms outstretched.
media:content.media:description: Nilson Angulo of Ecuador celebrates scoring his team's first goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match against Germany.

media:content.media:text: Ecuador v Germany: Group E - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Nilson Angulo of Ecuador celebrates scoring his team's first goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match against Germany.

item.title: Ecuador beats Germany in World Cup shocker, advances to knockout round

item.dc:creator: Lauren Zola
item.description: The GOP nominee for N.Y. governor later said Lander, who’s running for Congress, would have been a “collaborator” with the Nazis. Both candidates are Jewish.

media:content.media:description: Bruce Blakeman; Brad Lander.

item.title: GOP nominee for N.Y. governor says House candidate Brad Lander would be ‘a camp guard in the concentration camp’ for Nazis

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
Nicole Acevedo
item.description: DACA recipients are pushing to get answers about the government’s delays in approving DACA renewals, which have led recipients to lose work permits and their jobs.

media:content.media:description: Supporters of Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals on Capitol Hill in 2022.

item.title: Trump administration sued over DACA renewal delays

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: Attendance for this summer’s World Cup has already surpassed the record 3,587,538 set by the 1994 World Cup, which was hosted in the U.S., according to FIFA.

media:content.media:text: A packed outdoor stadium prior to a World Cup match.
media:content.media:description: The stadium was packed for the World Cup Group I match between Norway and Senegal in East Rutherford, N.J., this month.

media:content.media:text: A view from the upper level of a soccer stadium during a world cup match.
media:content.media:description: The stadium was packed for the World Cup Group I match between Norway and Senegal in East Rutherford, N.J., this month.

item.title: 3.6 million soccer fans have attended this year’s World Cup matches, setting a record
